privileged_info_summary: This task uses a real, publicly available sample image (AuPbSn40.jpg) from the ImageJ image repository at https://imagej.net/images/AuPbSn40.jpg. The image is a 600x412 pixel grayscale image of a Au-Pb-Sn (gold-lead-tin) solder sample. The spatial scale is 0.5 µm/pixel with height units mapped as 1 intensity unit = 1 nm (range 0-255 nm). Ground truth roughness parameters are: Ra=66.93, Rq=73.25, Rz=255.0, Mean_height=125.9, Median_height=130.0. These values are calculated directly from pixel intensities using standard profilometry definitions (Ra = mean absolute deviation, Rq = standard deviation, Rz = peak-to-valley height).
